title: Survivors of the Orphant Lands
subtitle: There were 50 of them
text: After years of fighting, the Resistance army is completely defeated. A group of survivors find themselves lost in spiritless orphant lands, where the first awakened tokens were born.

Nao convinces the exhausted tokens not to fall into despair. Certain that the group is destined to find the lost City, he strives to find the answers they need to revive their civilization. Mistrust is growing.
The fleet-footed Harold went searching for gas, and still hasn’t returned.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Bloody Kitties
text: Harold was away for a few days. Tracey was wrought-up. She persuaded Temoto to go scouting for her brother. All the tokens went with them, although Nao was against it. Following Harold’s footsteps, Temoto led everyone to the Oasis with gas. Everyone was delighted to finally see the source of salvation.

However, everything turned out to be not so easy. On a sudden, the knackered tokens are attacked by robotic Kitties that have transformed into bloodthirsty murderers over centuries. Temoto rushes to the Kitties leader and slaughters him in a brutal battle.

Several tokens have perished in the battle with the Kitties, but the fight ended in favor of our heroes. Harold was tied up. He was tortured. After a good dinner with fat Kitties, the tokens buried their fallen brothers. Nao decided to give speech, but Temoto wanted to take the floor himself, as it was him who led the group to the battle. An open conflict between the two leaders has started burning.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Wolf Party
text: Traveling through the desert takes a lot of effort. After the battle with kitties, the wounded tokens continue to search for the promised land. Suddenly, they come across a luxurious but shabby yacht stuck in the sand. Surprisingly, it is inhabited by hospitable wolves, who kindly invite the tokens to refresh themselves and spend the night.

It is an unheard of luxury in the post-apocalyptic desert to share supplies! Most of the tokens believe that this is a trap, and continue on their journey. However, Konstanz, Vacio and Harold accept the wolves’ invitation.

The result of this decision is prosaically predictable. The wolves ply the trusting tokens with booze, stuff them with all manner of dishes, fan our heroes to unthinkable sizes. The tokens turn into bubbles, and we all know what happens to bubbles sooner or later. They burst. Unfortunately, the tokens are met with the same fate.
Meanwhile, the remaining tokens continue their journey in the desert. On the horizon, Nao notices an impending storm and suggests that a group of volunteers go scouting to find shelter.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Freedom To Die
text: Continuing their search for a new home, the tokens are caught in the strongest sandstorm. Panting and stumbling, they wander in the desert, having already reconciled with the idea that here is where they will meet their fate.
Nao notices a cave in which everyone can hide.

Inside the cave, our heroes find salvation but, alas, not for long. The vaults of the cave collapse, blocking the exit and burying several heroes underneath. Once inside, the tokens are forced to look for another way out of the cave.

It turns out that Nao is among the heroes who are pinned down by stones. He is alive, but alone and unable to free himself from the wreckage, and his friends are already far away. Abandoned by everyone, staring death in the face, Nao meets a troll-hamster. A dispute develops between them.
In the meantime, the survivors escape the cave. By now, the storm is over, and the heroes meet with the scouts, who have successfully navigated all the troubles.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Redrum
text: The heroes got out of the cave; they were joined by a group of scouts, who had discovered a safe haven but they could not tell the others about it because of the storm. While they were preparing for the night, another token came to their camp. It was Boozy, who left the group a while ago and was considered dead.
After the rest that they needed so much, the heroes woke up to yet another death. One of the fellow tokens had been killed in the morning.
You have to work out for yourself who has left the show. Present your hypothesis in the character's storyline.
Trust no one but the smart contract.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Murder
text: In the morning, the tokens find Ben's lifeless body in the camp. There is not a single scratch on it, but Ben is dead. Our heroes decide to investigate this case to find out who the killer is. Theories are contradictory. The community of tokens divides into two large groups: one considers Temoto to be the killer, the other group accuses Jay.
The tokens’ individual takes are reflected in their stories.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: The Final Battle
text: Without having identified the killer, the tokens go further on their journey. The road leads them to the Genesis Block. Noir claims that you can meet the Creator there. However, etherbots come from afar. A battle is inevitable. The enemy's forces far exceed the strength of the tokens.

Just as confusion and panic are rife, Nao appears on the horizon. He managed to get out of the cave, and now he is ready to sacrifice himself and hold up the etherbots while the rest flee to escape to the Genesis Block.
Temoto and Jay stay with Nao. The tokens will lose the battle, and everyone understands this, but it will be a glorious defeat.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Scam
text: Genesis Block saved the tokens from the Etherbots. But, as the legend goes, no one has ever returned from there, dead or alive.

The voice of the Creator approaches the tokens. It tells them that their lives are mistakes, because life only ends in death and destruction. The Creator tells them to give up their lives, forget their names and become immortal. Many agree to the suggestion of the sly Creator, but not everyone.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Hard Fork
text: Kesh, who decided not to abandon his name, faces the Creator, who grants the hero three questions. Why three? Ask him, he will tell you. Maybe.
Kesh accepts the Creator's proposal and gives him the number of the block: 5259019. A perceptive spectator could easily guess to which address this will bring Kesh.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Tokencide
text: And here we go again. Yes, that’s right. As the Creator promised, he returned Kesh to the very moment that Nao gave his iconic speech (see the Prologue), which inspired everyone to go in search of the promised land.

But Kesh now knows that the search will lead to nothing but death. There is no escape. He tells his comrades what he saw in the future. He reveals to them the secret: the promised land is not a place that physically exists anywhere in this universe. It is merely the end of the show, which can only happen if just three tokens remain alive. Kesh suggests to stop looking for the promised land, to stop participating in this show, but nobody listens to him. This news excites the crowd. Some believe Kesh's words, others do not. The situation is heating up.

Corley draws his guns from his belt and starts shooting his comrades screaming: "For the promised land!" The slaughter begins. Tokens form alliances to survive. Some try to stop the madness, but they die. Tokens mercilessly exterminate each other until all the earth is covered with a mass of corpses. The battle seems to last forever.
We shall find out in whose body life is still burning and who has left Deus ETH forever, as soon as the sun rises.
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.

title: Tokenville
text: Deus ETH is finally over.  There are only two questions to be answered
1. Who are the winners?
2. Have they found Tokenville?
Check it out on tokenville.tv
comment: Explore the world of Deus ETH and highlight your character in personal stories.
